title:
NZ Post Code Geometries
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## NZ Post Code Geometries
I'd like the Post Code boundaries (as per https://www.nzpost.co.nz/tools/address-postcode-finder) but made available for processing in GIS applications.
Categorising point data by post code for deliveries without having to do it by hand

### Response from New Zealand Post Limited
Status Data not available for release
Comments This data forms part of our commercial product suite and is not provided free of charge.  There is a cost to License the data and very specific Terms and conditions are applied as to how it is to be used.

#### Likely Source Agency
New Zealand Post Limited
